modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be a few minor typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Can't figure out how to enable grammar and style in Microsoft Editor.

full_description_text: I'm trying to turn on the grammar and style features in Microsoft Editor. I’m using it in Outlook and Word, but I just can’t find the right settings. It’s kinda frustrating, and I’m not sure if I’m missing something obvious. Any help would be great!
short_description: Can't figure out how to enable grammar and style in Microsoft Editor.
description: I'm trying to turn on the grammar and style features in Microsoft Editor. I’m using it in Outlook and Word, but I just can’t find the right settings. It’s kinda frustrating, and I’m not sure if I’m missing something obvious. Any help would be great!
